oneOf.title: No action required
oneOf.description: No action required.

oneOf.title: Provide information
oneOf.description: Missing information requested without re-issuing invoice.

oneOf.title: Issue new invoice
oneOf.description: Request to re-issue a corrected invoice.

oneOf.title: Credit fully
oneOf.description: Request to fully cancel the referenced invoice with a credit note.

oneOf.title: Credit partially
oneOf.description: Request to issue partial credit note for corrections only.

oneOf.title: Credit the amount
oneOf.description: Request to repay the amount paid on the invoice.

oneOf.title: Other
oneOf.description: Requested action is not defined by code.

key.title: Key
key.description: Key helps determine what to do next.

description.title: Description
description.description:
Description includes human readable details about what steps should be
take next.

ext.title: Extensions
ext.description: Extensions for local or format focussed data

bill.Action.description: Action provides a suggestion about what to do next with the document.

code.title: Code
code.description: Code is generated by the system that raised the condition.

paths.title: Paths
paths.description:
Paths contains an array of JSON paths that maps the GOBL specific error
to a field inside the envelope that the condition is applied to.

message.title: Message
message.description: Message contains human readable details about the specific condition.

bill.Condition.description: Condition provides a more formal structure for describing with a specific code what has been unacceptable about the source document, including potentially references to the fields causing issues.

oneOf.title: No Issue
oneOf.description: Receiver of the documents sends the message just to update the status and there are no problems with document processing.

oneOf.title: References Incorrect
oneOf.description: Received document did not contain references as required by the receiver for correctly routing the document for approval or processing.

oneOf.title: Legal information incorrect
oneOf.description: Information in the received document is not according to legal requirements.

oneOf.title: Receiver unknown
oneOf.description: The party to which the document is addressed is not known.

oneOf.title: Item quality issue
oneOf.description: Unacceptable or incorrect quality.

oneOf.title: Delivery issues
oneOf.description: Delivery proposed or provided is not acceptable.

oneOf.title: Prices incorrect
oneOf.description: Prices not according to previous expectation.

oneOf.title: Quantity incorrect
oneOf.description: Quantity not according to previous expectation.

oneOf.title: Items incorrect
oneOf.description: Items not according to previous expectation.

oneOf.title: Payment terms incorrect
oneOf.description: Payment terms not according to previous expectation.

oneOf.title: Not recognized
oneOf.description: Commercial transaction not recognized.

oneOf.title: Finance incorrect
oneOf.description: Finance terms not according to previous expectation.

oneOf.title: Partially paid
oneOf.description: Payment is partially but not fully paid.

oneOf.title: Other
oneOf.description: Reason for status is not defined by code.

description.title: Description
description.description:
Description contains a simple text that describes the reason why the
original document was not processed.

conditions.title: Conditions
conditions.description:
Condition provides additional details with codes about what has gone
wrong with the incoming document.

ext.title: Extensions
ext.description: Extensions for local or format focussed data

bill.Reason.description: Reason helps the recipient of a message determine why they are receiving it.

$regime.title: Tax Regime
$regime.description:
Country code that identifies the tax regime applicable to the document.
It determines which country-specific tax rules, normalizations, and validations are applied.
It may be determined automatically via normalization of a supplier or issuer tax identity
country code.

$addons.title: Addons
$addons.description:
Addons defines a list of keys used to identify tax addons that apply special
normalization, scenarios, and validation rules to a document.

oneOf.title: Response
oneOf.description: A response to a document that has been submitted, often used in a two way communication between a customer and supplier.

oneOf.title: Update
oneOf.description: Issued by the supplier (or issuer) that may be shared with the customer, but more likely with a fifth-corner, like a government agency.

oneOf.title: System
oneOf.description: A system event that is not directly related to a specific document, but needs to be recorded for compliance purposes.

type.title: Type
type.description: Type of status being reported (e.g. "system" for internal events).

issue_date.title: Issue Date
issue_date.description: IssueDate is the date when the status is to be considered effective.

issue_time.title: Issue Time
issue_time.description:
IssueTime is used when extra precision is required to determine when exactly
the status was issued.

series.title: Series
series.description: Series is an optional code to group related status events together.

code.title: Code
code.description: Code provides a way to identify the specific status event being reported.

ext.title: Extensions
ext.description: Ext provides additional structured data specific to the regime or addon.

ordering.title: Ordering
ordering.description:
Ordering provides links to related documents and details that may have occurred
before this status was created.

supplier.title: Supplier
supplier.description:
Supplier represents the entity supplying the goods or services in the
original transaction and may not be the issuer of the document.

customer.title: Customer
customer.description:
Customer is optional and describes the recipient of the original
services. In the case of a local or system event, this will be empty.

issuer.title: Issuer
issuer.description:
Issuer represents an intermediary acting on behalf of either the supplier
or customer in order to provide a status update, this is useful
specifically if only the third party is registered on a network.
(Optional).

recipient.title: Recipient
recipient.description:
Recipient represents another intermediary responsible for receiving the
event when the supplier or customer do not have networking capabilities.
May also be a tax agency in a five corner model.
(Optional).

lines.title: Lines
lines.description:
Lines contain the main payload of the message used to describe individual
documents which have a status. A message may not have any lines.
(Optional).

notes.title: Notes
notes.description: Notes for additional details about the event.

meta.title: Meta
meta.description: Meta contains unstructured data useful for internal tools.

bill.Status.description: Status represents a system or business event that needs to be recorded for compliance purposes.

index.title: Index
index.description: Position of the row inside the message, determined automatically.

anyOf.title: Issued
anyOf.description: Document has been submitted pending review by the recipient.

anyOf.title: Acknowledged
anyOf.description: Received a readable invoice message that can be understood and submitted for processing by the Buyer.

anyOf.title: In Process
anyOf.description: Indicates that the referenced message or transaction is being processed.

anyOf.title: Under Query
anyOf.description: Buyer will not proceed to accept the Invoice without receiving additional information from the Seller.

anyOf.title: Rejected
anyOf.description: Buyer will not process the referenced Invoice any further. Buyer is rejecting this invoice but not necessarily the commercial transaction. Although it can be used also for rejection for commercial reasons (invoice not corresponding to delivery).

anyOf.title: Accepted / Approved
anyOf.description: Buyer has given a final approval of the invoice and the next step is payment.

anyOf.title: Paid
anyOf.description: Buyer has initiated payment, or the supplier has acknowledged receipt of payment.

anyOf.title: Error
anyOf.description: There is a technical issue with the document that has caused it to be rejected.

key.title: Key
key.description: Status Key indicates the situation of the document

date.title: Date
date.description: When this row should be considered effective

doc.title: Document
doc.description:
Document reference or details about the document that needs to be looked
at.

description.title: Description
description.description:
Description includes a human readable description that explains the
reason for the current status, if necessary.

reasons.title: Reasons
reasons.description:
Reasons define an array of reason objects that help the recipient
determine why the status was provided.

actions.title: Actions
actions.description:
Actions contains an array of actions that should be carried out by the
recipient of the message. These are suggestions.

ext.title: Extensions
ext.description: Extensions for local or format focussed data

complements.title: Complements
complements.description: Complements contain regime/addon specific payload data.

meta.title: Meta
meta.description: Additional data specific for the source system.

bill.StatusLine.description: StatusLine represents a single row inside a message, that describes the situation of another business document.
